policy.rule: Draft decisions are not authority. They are review aids for Nic before a lockfile exists.

decisions.reason: Patch 68 scored a frozen candidate, but an active primary AI.Web variant exists; draft favors active primary until reviewed.

cautions: core runtime role candidate; verify against symbolic-runtime-map before lockfile
